scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @diorama/schema && npm run build -w @diorama/core && npm run build -w @diorama/export-r3f && npm run build -w @diorama/r3f-bridge && npm run build -w @diorama/ingestion && npm run build -w @diorama/local-bridge && npm run build -w diorama && npm run build -w @diorama/mcp && npm run build -w @diorama/examples
scripts.test: npm run test -w @diorama/schema && npm run test -w @diorama/core && npm run test -w @diorama/export-r3f && npm run test -w @diorama/r3f-bridge && npm run test -w @diorama/ingestion && npm run test -w @diorama/local-bridge && npm run test -w @diorama/mcp && npm run test -w web
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w web
